description: You are investigating a fraud case involving a suspect's camera memory card image (/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd). The suspect claims the card was wiped, but you must use carving techniques to recover files from unallocated space. Create a forensic case named 'Carving_Analysis_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-CARV-006') and process the data source using PhotoRec Carver, File Type Identification, and Hash Lookup. Document the results by creating a catalog of carved files at /home/ga/Reports/carved_files_catalog.txt (Format: FILENAME|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH|CARVED_FROM_OFFSET) and a catalog of allocated non-system files at /home/ga/Reports/allocated_files_catalog.txt (Format: FILENAME|FILE_SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH|FULL_PATH). Finally, compare the MD5 hashes to identify unique wiped files and write an analysis report to /home/ga/Reports/carving_analysis_report.txt. The report must include the following labeled sections on separate lines: CASE_NAME, CASE_NUMBER, DATA_SOURCE, TOTAL_ALLOCATED_FILES, TOTAL_CARVED_FILES, CARVED_DUPLICATES, CARVED_UNIQUE, CARVING_METHOD (PhotoRec), and a 1-3 sentence FORENSIC_ASSESSMENT regarding evidence of data destruction.
